northStar: Vibrant Pop Canvas: Bold and graphic against bright white.

dos: Use Royal Indigo (#4e64df) for all primary interactive elements like buttons and prominent links.
Apply Canvas White (#ffffff) as the default background for content sections and primary cards.
Employ Midnight Ink (#151523) for all primary headings and body text to ensure high contrast and readability.
Maintain a compact density with an elementGap of 8px between closely related UI components.
Utilize a 12px border-radius for most interactive elements and general cards to maintain a consistent soft aesthetic.
Use Sharp Grotesk for large headings (20px and above) to introduce distinct brand personality.
Apply subtle shadow rgba(21, 21, 35, 0.2) 0px 2px 4px 0px for elevated cards to create clear visual separation.
donts: Avoid using multiple chromatic colors for primary actions on a single screen; reserve Crimson Strike (#ff0000) for highest urgency only.
Do not use dark backgrounds for large content areas; the system relies on a light canvas for readability.
Do not deviate from the established padding and radius values for buttons and cards; consistency in these areas is key.
Avoid using decorative gradients for non-brand essential elements; they are reserved for specific brand communication.
Do not introduce new font families; the current selection provides sufficient typographic range.
Do not reduce border-radius below 12px for standard components; the rounded aesthetic is a core identifier.
Avoid making text too light against white backgrounds; ensure sufficient contrast with Midnight Ink (#151523) or Faded Steel (#49495a).

colors.name: Midnight Ink
colors.role: Primary text, borders, dark surface backgrounds for emphasis, prominent headings, and input text

colors.name: Canvas White
colors.role: Page backgrounds, primary card surfaces, active input fields, and all text on dark backgrounds

colors.name: Ghost Gray
colors.role: Secondary card backgrounds, subtle dividers, and inactive element states

colors.name: Border Silver
colors.role: Hairline borders, muted input outlines, and subtle separators

colors.name: Cloud Whisper
colors.role: Subtle background wash for cards and featured sections, indicating a slight elevation or grouping without strong contrast

colors.name: Royal Indigo
colors.role: Primary action buttons, prominent links, interactive borders, and key brand elements — provides a strong, positive interactive cue

colors.name: Crimson Strike
colors.role: Red action color for filled buttons, selected navigation states, and focused conversion moments. Use as a supporting accent, not as a status color

colors.name: Lavender Mist
colors.role: Violet outline accent for tags, dividers, and focused UI edges. Do not promote it to the primary CTA color

colors.name: Electric Violet
colors.role: Icon fills and decorative elements emphasizing brand recognition; a slightly brighter variant of the brand's core blue

colors.name: Faded Steel
colors.role: Subtle text for secondary information and descriptive copy, providing less visual weight than primary text

colors.name: Vivid Chroma Gradient
colors.role: Decorative banner backgrounds, section highlights — used for brand communication and visual interest

designSystem.layout: The page primarily uses a max-width contained layout of 1440px, with content centered. The hero section often features full-bleed imagery or gradient backgrounds with centered text overlays. Vertical rhythm is established through consistent section gaps and alternating content arrangements, including two-column text-left/image-right patterns and three-column card grids for features. Navigation is a sticky top bar with prominent brand links and actions.
designSystem.imagery: The visual language predominantly features high-quality, product-focused photography and lifestyle imagery on white or subtly colored backgrounds. These are often contained within rounded card shapes or as full-bleed hero elements. Illustrations are flat, colorful, and organic, used for decorative atmosphere and branding, often featuring a vibrant gradient. Icons are primarily outlined or filled versions of Electric Violet (#6c7ee4), maintaining a crisp, light stroke. Imagery density is moderate, with images used to break up text and showcase products or features.

similar.why: User-generated content platforms with a focus on product display, often using a clean white aesthetic and vibrant accent colors.
Marketplace UI with a focus on clear product presentation, consistent card layouts, and strong calls to action set against a light background.
Community-driven apparel and design e-commerce featuring diverse imagery within a structured, often white-dominant layout with bold typography.
Digital asset marketplace with a clean UI, prominent product cards, and a mix of neutral and accent colors for hierarchy and interaction.

surfaces.name: Cloud Whisper
surfaces.purpose: Elevated card backgrounds, grouped content areas

designSystem.northStar: Vibrant Pop Canvas: Bold and graphic against bright white.

components.name: Ghost Button
components.role: Secondary actions or navigation links that need less emphasis. They appear as text with a transparent background.
components.description: Transparent background, white text (#ffffff), no border. Radius: 12px. Padding: 0px.

components.name: Neutral Outlined Button
components.role: Tertiary actions or category filters, providing interaction without competing with primary calls to action.
components.description: Transparent background, #151523 text, #151523 1px border. Radius: 12px. Padding: 12px 16px.

components.name: Primary Filled Button
components.description: Background: #4e64df. Text: #ffffff. No border. Radius: 12px. Padding: 8px 16px.

components.name: Crimson Call To Action Button
components.role: High-urgency primary actions, distinct from the brand's standard primary color.
components.description: Background: #ff0000. Text: #ffffff. No border. Radius: 10px. Padding: 14px 28px.

components.name: Elevated Feature Card
components.role: Highlighting key features or content, using elevation to draw attention.
components.description: Background: #e9e9ec. Radius: 20px. Shadow: rgba(21, 21, 35, 0.2) 0px 4px 8px 0px. No internal padding.

components.name: Grouped Content Card
components.role: Organizing related content into visually distinct blocks on the page, with subtle elevation.

components.name: Subtle Information Card
components.role: Presenting supplementary information or less prominent content, without strong visual weighting.

components.name: Search Input Field
components.role: Primary user input for search functions.

components.name: Outline Input Field
components.role: General form inputs, blending subtly into the background.
components.description: Transparent background. Text: #000000. Border: #000000. Radius: 0px. Padding: 1px 2px.

components.name: Standard Input Field
components.role: Basic input fields across the application.

typography.role: Arial — detected in extracted data but not described by AI
Primary body text, labels, and general UI elements. Its slightly condensed and clean appearance supports compact layouts.
Sub-headings, navigation links, and emphasized text within body copy. Its semi-bold presence ensures clear hierarchy.
Medium to large headings, where a strong but not overpowering statement is needed. The robust weight provides importance without being overly aggressive.
Large display headings and prominent call-to-action text. Its distinctive, impactful character grabs attention, signaling key messages.

designSystem.description: TeePublic utilizes a dynamic, high-contrast aesthetic with a playful edge. Dark primary text and bold accent colors define a vibrant mood, set against a predominantly white and subtle gray surface palette. Components feature soft, large radii and distinct shadow treatments, ensuring readability while maintaining a confident, attention-grabbing presence.

customSections.title: Agent Prompt Guide
customSections.content:
Quick Color Reference:
text: #151523
background: #ffffff
border: #d7d7db
accent: #99a7f5
primary action: #4e64df (filled action)

Example Component Prompts:
1. Create a neutral outlined button: transparent background, #151523 text, #151523 1px border, 12px radius, 12px 16px padding, Roobert weight 600, size 14px.
2. Create a primary filled button: #4e64df background, #ffffff text, no border, 12px radius, 8px 16px padding, Roobert weight 700, size 16px.
3. Create an elevated feature card: #e9e9ec background, 20px radius, rgba(21, 21, 35, 0.2) 0px 4px 8px 0px shadow, no internal padding. Place a headline inside at Sharp Grotesk weight 700, size 28px, #151523.
4. Create a standard input field: #ffffff background, #151523 text, #d7d7db border, 12px radius, 12px 32px 12px 16px padding, Roobert weight 400, size 14px.
5. Create a secondary information card: #f1f3fe background, 12px radius, no shadow, 12px padding. Add body text at Roobert weight 400, size 14px, #49495a.
